name: docx
tagline: Creates, edits, and analyzes Word (.docx) documents via docx-js, direct XML editing, pandoc conversion, and LibreOffice rendering.
verdict: Solid, safe skill: no network egress, exec, or destructive-op risk; concrete step-by-step instructions with worked XML examples for tracked changes and comments. Gaps: no version/changelog signal, an unpinned npm docx fallback install, and pandoc/soffice/pdftoppm listed as dependencies only at the very end with no upfront check or missing-tool guidance.

highlights.summary: Fallback installs well-known 'docx' npm package unpinned (no version), pulling whatever is latest.
No guidance anywhere for missing/failing pandoc, soffice, or pdftoppm; only the npm docx require-fallback path is covered.
Dependencies are declared only in the final line, after pandoc/soffice/pdftoppm are already invoked earlier in the doc with no prior mention or availability check.
